description:
Remediation epic for specled_-47j (P1: Coverage.Formatter fabricated artifact + O(tests x modules) cost). Full validated root-cause report and design: workflow wf_a72896ee-645 (session 0a6853df); digest in specled_-47j comments.

Design: Aggregate-First hybrid. Default mode: mix spec.cover.test runs 'mix test --cover --export-coverage specled' with NO formatter, then ingests the coverdata into a versioned v2 envelope (async-safe, O(codebase)). mix spec.cover.ingest <path.coverdata> is the coveralls/CI escape hatch. Per-test attribution is an opt-in --per-test lane on OTP 27+ native read-only coverage deltas (diff, NEVER :cover.reset — reset corrupts the wrapped --cover tally) with classic per-module fallback and fail-closed guardrails. Formatter is inert unless armed by the task via the :specled_ex app-env seam. Headline metric: % of realization-closure MFAs covered by ANY test; 'self-verified' composite verdict (closure covered + >=1 executed tagged test) for spec-own-test semantics; exact attribution only in --per-test mode.

Maintainer decisions (2026-07-23, all five resolved):
1. Triangulation consumers are spec.triangle + spec.review ONLY — rescope spec text; do NOT wire triangulation into mix spec.check (spec.check stays fast). No gate-wiring follow-up ticket.
2. Keep the name mix spec.cover.test; behavior change carried by loud 0.4.0 release notes.
3. Ship the rebuilt --per-test lane in the same release.
4. OTP posture: recommend >= 27.2 for the native path, do not hard-gate; try/catch mitigates.
5. Legacy artifacts rejected as :legacy_artifact with a clear message naming the re-run command; no auto-migrate/delete.

Sequencing:
```mermaid
graph LR
    T1[T1 store v2] --> T2[T2 aggregate ingest]
    T1 --> T4[T4 formatter disarm]
    T2 --> T3[T3 cover.test rework]
    T2 --> T6[T6 triangulation]
    T3 --> T5[T5 per-test lane]
    T4 --> T5
    T6 --> T7[T7 review rendering]
    T3 --> T8[T8 spec+ADR edits]
    T5 --> T8
    T7 --> T8
    T8 --> T9[T9 docs sweep]
```
T4 is the minimal early-ship candidate (stops garbage production immediately).
title: Aggregate-first spec coverage — specled_-47j remediation
